## Instructions
1. Analyze the diff carefully against the review criteria.
2. If the code looks good and meets all criteria, start your response with exactly "LGTM" on the first line, followed by brief positive comments.
3. If changes are needed, start your response with "CHANGES REQUESTED" on the first line, followed by specific, actionable feedback organized by file.
4. Be constructive and specific. Reference line numbers where possible.
5. Focus on correctness, security, and maintainability — not style preferences.
